description: Creates a plane in 3D space from parametric equations in parameters t and s.
utility: Create a plane from parametric equations

arguments.name: x(t,s)
arguments.description: x-coordinate as a function of t and s

arguments.name: y(t,s)
arguments.description: y-coordinate as a function of t and s

arguments.name: z(t,s)
arguments.description: z-coordinate as a function of t and s

alternates.description: Plane defined by three parametric equations in t and s

examples.scenario: Parametric plane through point (1,0,0) with direction vectors
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
pl = paraplane3d(G, "1 + 2*t", "s", "t + s")

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
pl = paraplane3d(G, "t", "s", "0", fc(lightblue), fo(0.2))
